text.title: Django Services Layer Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure applying the django-services methodology end-to-end. Each step lists inputs, action, output, and optional decision gate.

step.name: inventory-view-logic
step.action: List business-logic blocks in views; group by entity.

step.name: draft-service-signature
step.action: Write entity_action(*, kw, ...) -> ReturnType with full type hints.

step.name: move-logic
step.action: Move logic out of view into the service body; view calls service.

step.name: apply-atomic
step.action: If ≥2 writes that must succeed together, wrap in @transaction.atomic.

step.name: defer-side-effects
step.action: Replace direct task.delay()/webhook/email with transaction.on_commit dispatch.

step.name: write-service-test
step.action: Add unit test calling the service directly (no Client) and asserting model + side-effect.
